REPLY TO DEFT'S OPPOS. TO PLTF'S MTN TO VACATE ORDER GRANTING DEFT'S MTN FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEEHAN, TIMOTHY

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY MEEHAN'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER GRANTING DEFT'S MTN FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. THE 8/31/10 ORDER GRANTING FEES IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE HIS PROPOSED OPPOSITION, AND DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS RESTORED TO THE CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON 10/28/10. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-28-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-18-2011 - DISMISSAL ON FILE.

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TREPETIN, ALEXANDER TREPETIN, EVA

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER TREPETIN AND EVA TREPETIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 THROUGH 9 BECAUSE THEY DO NOT ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY AND, IN ANY EVENT, AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 THROUGH 6 AND 8 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AS TO NO PRIVILEGED CONDUCT. GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 2 BECAUSE THEY DO ARISE IN MATERIAL PART FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN A PRIMA FACIE CASE ON THE MERITS WITH ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER TREPETIN AND EVA TREPETIN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

Defendants Alexander Trepetin And Eva Trepetin'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lisa Garcia, Esq. of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pederson & Treppa, 415-951-2825 for defendant and moving party Alexander Trepetin

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Defendants Alexander Trepetin And Eva Trepetin'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees IS GRANTED. THE COURT AWARDS $5,650.00 AS REASONABLE FEES IN LIGHT OF DEFENDANT'S PARTIAL SUCCESS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lisa Garcia, Eqs. Of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pederson & Treppa, 415-951-2825 for defendant and moving party/opposing party Alexander Trepetin and Eva Trepetin
S. Clinton Woods, Esq, of Bradshaw & Associates, 415-433-4800 for plaintiff and moving/opposing party Timothy Meehan

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY MEEHAN'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Granting Deft'S Mtn For Attorney'S Fees IS GRANTED. THE 8/31/10 ORDER GRANTING FEES IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE HIS PROPOSED OPPOSITION, AND DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS RESTORED TO THE CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON 10/28/10. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DREXEL A. BRADSHAW & ATTY. SHEILA M. BARI OF THE BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 433-4800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JEFFREY V. TA OF THE BLEDSOE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 981-5411 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER TREPETIN AND EVA TREPETIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 THROUGH 9 BECAUSE THEY DO NOT ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY AND, IN ANY EVENT, AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 THROUGH 6 AND 8 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AS TO NO PRIVILEGED CONDUCT. GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 2 BECAUSE THEY DO ARISE IN MATERIAL PART FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN A PRIMA FACIE CASE ON THE MERITS WITH ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
